title: styrax cordatus
intro: Styrax cordatus, also known as the styrax or star anise tree, is a plant species that belongs to the Storax family. Traditionally, the plant's resin has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Styrax cordatus include relieving digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and fighting off infections. The plant's resin is often used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, salves, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
